critic_findings.message: mkdirSync before atomicWriteFileSync is redundant: atomicWriteFileSync->writeAndRename already calls mkdirSync(dirname(path), {recursive:true}) at line 22 of atomic-write.ts. The guard can never do useful work.

The schemaVersion-mismatch test (line 46-59) uses writeFileSync to corrupt the file after writeSnapshot. It imports writeFileSync from the test's own import list, not from the module under test — acceptable — but the test name says 'returns null when schemaVersion mismatches' without clarifying which direction. A schemaVersion of 0 (or missing) is an equally important case. One additional short test for schemaVersion: undefined would make the mismatch contract complete.
